questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The Constituent Assembly was formed in 1946.

(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The Constitution of India was adopted on November 26, 1949.

(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
